content.speakerText: For Q3, we’ll need one more dev and a UX designer to hit the launch deadline.
content.speakerTextCn: Q3我们需要再加一名开发和一名UI设计师才能按时上线。

options.text: I’ll hire two new freelancers right away.
I can reallocate Maria from the legacy project—she’s got the right skills. Can we start next Monday?
I’m not sure we have any budget left for more staff.
Maybe we can delay the launch if we can’t get more people.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体的资源解决方案（调派Maria）并附带可行的时间安排，符合‘资源请求要具体+建议方案’的原则。其他选项要么回避问题（opt_3）、要么推卸责任（opt_4），或未经协调就承诺外部招聘（opt_1），均不符合职场高效沟通的策略。

content.speakerText: We’re falling behind on the analytics module. We need someone with data visualization expertise.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们在数据分析模块上落后了，我们需要一位具备数据可视化专长的人。

options.text: I know John from marketing has done some dashboards—he can help.
Can we borrow Lisa from the BI team? She built the last three dashboards and has bandwidth this week.
Maybe we should just skip the visualization part.
I’ll send an email to HR to post a job opening.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确指出了具体人选（Lisa）、所属团队（BI team）、相关经验（做过三个仪表盘）和可用性（本周有空），是高效资源请求的典范。选项1中John非技术团队成员，经验不匹配；选项3回避问题；选项4耗时太长，不符合‘快速响应’的职场需求。

content.speakerText: The client wants a prototype by Friday, but our design team is overloaded.
content.speakerTextCn: 客户希望周五前拿到原型，但我们的设计团队已经超负荷了。

options.text: We should tell the client we can’t meet the deadline.
I can ask Tom from the mobile team to help—he’s done prototyping before and has capacity.
Can we just use a template instead of building a real prototype?
I’ll schedule a meeting next week to discuss resource allocation.

content.explanation: 正确答案提出内部资源调配方案，结合了人员技能匹配（曾做过原型）和当前可用性（有空），是积极解决问题的表达。选项1是消极应对，选项3降低质量，选项4拖延时间，均不符合‘资源请求要主动提出可行方案’的要求。

content.template: I can ___ Maria from the legacy project—she’s got the right skills.
content.hint: 表示从一个项目调人到另一个项目
content.knowledgePoint: 资源调配动词搭配（reallocate resources）

content.template: Could we ___ Lisa from the BI team to help with the dashboard?
content.hint: 临时借用其他团队的成员
content.knowledgePoint: 跨团队资源借用的惯用表达（borrow someone）

content.template: We need ___ support to meet the Q3 launch deadline.
content.hint: 用于正式请求更多资源时的常用形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 资源请求中的高频修饰词（additional support）

content.speakerText: For Q3, we’ll need one more dev and a UX designer to hit the launch deadline.
content.speakerTextCn: Q3我们需要再加一名开发和一名UI设计师才能按时上线。
expectedAnswers: I can reallocate Maria from the legacy project—she’s got the right skills. Can we start next Monday?
We could move someone from the testing team—Jenny has UX experience and is available next week.
I’ll check who’s available internally first. Would a part-time contractor work if we can’t find someone internally?
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确提出了具体可调配的人员或资源方案
是否使用了场景关键词如 'reallocate', 'available', 'skills' 等
是否语气积极、有协作性，而非单纯抱怨或推脱

content.speakerText: We’re behind on the API integration—could we get help from the backend team?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们在API集成上落后了，能从后端团队获得帮助吗？
expectedAnswers: I can ask David—he’s been working on similar integrations and has bandwidth this week.
Let me check with the backend lead. Maybe we can assign one person for half a day this week.
Would it help if I pair a frontend dev with a backend engineer for a few sprints?
evaluationCriteria: 是否提出具体人员或协作方式，而非泛泛请求
是否体现对他人工作负荷的考虑（如 'bandwidth', 'half a day'）
是否使用了自然口语表达，避免机械背诵

content.speakerText: The QA team is swamped before the release. Do you think we can get temporary support?
content.speakerTextCn: QA团队在发布前人手紧张，你觉得能获得临时支持吗？
expectedAnswers: I can pull two interns from the training program—they’ve been shadowing QA and can handle basic test cases.
We could extend the contract of the freelance QA from last quarter—she’s familiar with our system.
Would it be possible to delay non-critical test cycles by two days to free up capacity?
evaluationCriteria: 是否提供切实可行的临时资源方案（实习生、外包、时间调整）
是否提及被调用人员的相关经验或适配性
是否展现出解决问题的主动性而非被动等待
